+    private static final class Storage {
+        static final int SCHEMA_VERSION = 1;
+        private final Path database = Path.of("game.db");
+        private boolean initialized;
+
+        synchronized void initialize() {
+            runSql(schemaSql());
+            initialized = Files.exists(database);
+        }
+
+        synchronized boolean initialized() {
+            return initialized && Files.exists(database);
+        }
+
+        synchronized void reset() {
+            try {
+                Files.deleteIfExists(database);
+            } catch (IOException e) {
+                throw new IllegalStateException(e);
+            }
+            initialized = false;
+            initialize();
+        }
+
+        synchronized void saveUser(User user) {
+            runSql("INSERT OR REPLACE INTO users(username, role, salt_hex, password_hash_hex) VALUES ("
+                    + sql(user.username()) + ", "
+                    + sql(user.role()) + ", "
+                    + sql(hex(user.passwordHash().salt())) + ", "
+                    + sql(hex(user.passwordHash().hash())) + ");");
+        }
+
+        synchronized void saveCombatSession(CombatSession session) {
+            StringBuilder sql = new StringBuilder();
+            sql.append("BEGIN;\n");
+            sql.append("INSERT OR REPLACE INTO combat_sessions(id, round, turn_index) VALUES (")
+                    .append(sql(session.id)).append(", ")
+                    .append(session.round).append(", ")
+                    .append(session.turnIndex).append(");\n");
+            sql.append("DELETE FROM combatants WHERE session_id = ").append(sql(session.id)).append(";\n");
+            for (int i = 0; i < session.order.size(); i++) {
+                Combatant combatant = session.order.get(i);
+                sql.append("INSERT INTO combatants(session_id, position, name, dex, score) VALUES (")
+                        .append(sql(session.id)).append(", ")
+                        .append(i).append(", ")
+                        .append(sql(combatant.name())).append(", ")
+                        .append(combatant.dex()).append(", ")
+                        .append(combatant.score()).append(");\n");
+            }
+            sql.append("COMMIT;");
+            runSql(sql.toString());
+        }
+
+        synchronized void saveCombatState(CombatSession session) {
+            StringBuilder sql = new StringBuilder();
+            sql.append("BEGIN;\n");
+            sql.append("UPDATE combat_sessions SET round = ")
+                    .append(session.round)
+                    .append(", turn_index = ")
+                    .append(session.turnIndex)
+                    .append(" WHERE id = ")
+                    .append(sql(session.id))
+                    .append(";\n");
+            appendConditionSave(sql, session);
+            sql.append("COMMIT;");
+            runSql(sql.toString());
+        }
+
+        synchronized void saveConditions(CombatSession session) {
+            StringBuilder sql = new StringBuilder();
+            sql.append("BEGIN;\n");
+            appendConditionSave(sql, session);
+            sql.append("COMMIT;");
+            runSql(sql.toString());
+        }
+
+        private void appendConditionSave(StringBuilder sql, CombatSession session) {
+            sql.append("DELETE FROM conditions WHERE session_id = ").append(sql(session.id)).append(";\n");
+            for (Map.Entry<String, List<Condition>> entry : session.conditions.entrySet()) {
+                List<Condition> conditions = entry.getValue();
+                for (int i = 0; i < conditions.size(); i++) {
+                    Condition condition = conditions.get(i);
+                    sql.append("INSERT INTO conditions(session_id, target, position, condition_name, remaining_rounds) VALUES (")
+                            .append(sql(session.id)).append(", ")
+                            .append(sql(entry.getKey())).append(", ")
+                            .append(i).append(", ")
+                            .append(sql(condition.name())).append(", ")
+                            .append(condition.remainingRounds()).append(");\n");
+                }
+            }
+        }
+
+        private String schemaSql() {
+            return """
+                    PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;
+                    PRAGMA user_version = %d;
+                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_meta (
+                      key TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
+                      value TEXT NOT NULL
+                    );
+                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
+                      username TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
+                      role TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      salt_hex TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      password_hash_hex TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+                    );
+                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS combat_sessions (
+                      id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
+                      round INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                      turn_index INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                      created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+                    );
+                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS combatants (
+                      session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      position INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                      name TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      dex INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                      score INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                      PRIMARY KEY (session_id, position),
+                      FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES combat_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
+                    );
+                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS conditions (
+                      session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      target TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      position INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                      condition_name TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      remaining_rounds INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                      PRIMARY KEY (session_id, target, position),
+                      FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES combat_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
+                    );
+                    INSERT OR REPLACE INTO schema_meta(key, value) VALUES
+                      ('driver', 'sqlite'),
+                      ('schema_version', '%d');
+                    """.formatted(SCHEMA_VERSION, SCHEMA_VERSION);
+        }
+
+        private void runSql(String sql) {
+            ProcessBuilder builder = new ProcessBuilder("sqlite3", database.toString());
+            builder.redirectErrorStream(true);
+            try {
+                Process process = builder.start();
+                try (OutputStream input = process.getOutputStream()) {
+                    input.write(sql.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
+                }
+                String output;
+                try (InputStream stream = process.getInputStream()) {
+                    output = new String(stream.readAllBytes(), StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
+                }
+                int status = process.waitFor();
+                if (status != 0) {
+                    throw new IllegalStateException(output);
+                }
+            } catch (IOException e) {
+                throw new IllegalStateException(e);
+            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
+                Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
+                throw new IllegalStateException(e);
+            }
+        }
+
+        private static String sql(String value) {
+            return "'" + value.replace("'", "''") + "'";
+        }
+
+        private static String hex(byte[] bytes) {
+            char[] digits = "0123456789abcdef".toCharArray();
+            char[] output = new char[bytes.length * 2];
+            for (int i = 0; i < bytes.length; i++) {

+                output[i * 2] = digits[value >>> 4];
+                output[i * 2 + 1] = digits[value & 0x0f];
+            }
+            return new String(output);
+        }
+    }

   342	    private static void addCondition(HttpExchange exchange, String id) throws IOException {
   343	        Map<String, Object> body = readObject(exchange);
   344	        String target = asString(body.get("target"));
   345	        String conditionName = asString(body.get("condition"));
   346	        int durationRounds = asInt(body.get("duration_rounds"));
   347	        if (target.isEmpty() || conditionName.isEmpty() || durationRounds <= 0) {
   348	            throw new BadRequest();
   349	        }
   350	
   351	        String response;
   352	        synchronized (COMBAT_SESSIONS) {
   353	            CombatSession session = combatSession(id);
   354	            if (!session.hasCombatant(target)) {
   355	                throw new BadRequest();
   356	            }
   357	            List<Condition> conditions = session.conditions.computeIfAbsent(target, ignored -> new ArrayList<>());
   358	            conditions.add(new Condition(conditionName, durationRounds));
   359	            STORAGE.saveConditions(session);
   360	            response = "{\"target\":\"" + escape(target) + "\",\"conditions\":" + conditionsJson(conditions) + "}";
   361	        }
   362	
   363	        send(exchange, 200, response);
   364	    }

   366	    private static void advanceCombat(HttpExchange exchange, String id) throws IOException {
   367	        String response;
   368	        synchronized (COMBAT_SESSIONS) {
   369	            CombatSession session = combatSession(id);
   370	            session.turnIndex++;
   371	            if (session.turnIndex >= session.order.size()) {
   372	                session.turnIndex = 0;
   373	                session.round++;
   374	            }
   375	            decrementActiveConditions(session);
   376	            STORAGE.saveCombatState(session);
   377	            response = sessionJson(session, false);
   378	        }
   379	        send(exchange, 200, response);
   380	    }

    61	    private static final class Router implements HttpHandler {
    62	        @Override
    63	        public void handle(HttpExchange exchange) throws IOException {
    64	            try {
    65	                String method = exchange.getRequestMethod();
    66	                String path = exchange.getRequestURI().getPath();
    67	
    68	                if ("GET".equals(method) && "/health".equals(path)) {
    69	                    send(exchange, 200, "{\"ok\":true}");
    70	                    return;
    71	                }
    72	                if ("GET".equals(method) && "/v1/storage/status".equals(path)) {
    73	                    storageStatus(exchange);
    74	                    return;
    75	                }
    76	
    77	                if (!"POST".equals(method)) {
    78	                    send(exchange, 404, "{\"error\":\"not found\"}");
    79	                    return;
    80	                }
    81	
    82	                Matcher conditionsMatcher = COMBAT_CONDITIONS.matcher(path);
    83	                if (conditionsMatcher.matches()) {
    84	                    addCondition(exchange, conditionsMatcher.group(1));
    85	                    return;
    86	                }
    87	                Matcher advanceMatcher = COMBAT_ADVANCE.matcher(path);
    88	                if (advanceMatcher.matches()) {
    89	                    advanceCombat(exchange, advanceMatcher.group(1));
    90	                    return;
    91	                }

    93	                switch (path) {

   103	                    case "/v1/auth/login" -> login(exchange);
   104	                    case "/v1/storage/reset" -> resetStorage(exchange);
   105	                    default -> send(exchange, 404, "{\"error\":\"not found\"}");
   106	                }
   107	            } catch (BadRequest e) {
   108	                send(exchange, 400, "{\"error\":\"bad request\"}");

   770	
   771	        private void appendConditionSave(StringBuilder sql, CombatSession session) {
   772	            sql.append("DELETE FROM conditions WHERE session_id = ").append(sql(session.id)).append(";\n");
   773	            for (Map.Entry<String, List<Condition>> entry : session.conditions.entrySet()) {
   774	                List<Condition> conditions = entry.getValue();
   775	                for (int i = 0; i < conditions.size(); i++) {
   776	                    Condition condition = conditions.get(i);
   777	                    sql.append("INSERT INTO conditions(session_id, target, position, condition_name, remaining_rounds) VALUES (")
   778	                            .append(sql(session.id)).append(", ")
   779	                            .append(sql(entry.getKey())).append(", ")
   780	                            .append(i).append(", ")
   781	                            .append(sql(condition.name())).append(", ")
   782	                            .append(condition.remainingRounds()).append(");\n");
   783	                }
   784	            }
   785	        }
   786	
   787	        private String schemaSql() {
   788	            return """
   789	                    PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;
   790	                    PRAGMA user_version = %d;
   791	                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_meta (
   792	                      key TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
   793	                      value TEXT NOT NULL
   794	                    );
   795	                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
   796	                      username TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
   797	                      role TEXT NOT NULL,
   798	                      salt_hex TEXT NOT NULL,
   799	                      password_hash_hex TEXT NOT NULL,
   800	                      created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
   801	                    );
   802	                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS combat_sessions (
   803	                      id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
   804	                      round INTEGER NOT NULL,
   805	                      turn_index INTEGER NOT NULL,
   806	                      created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
   807	                    );
   808	                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS combatants (
   809	                      session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
   810	                      position INTEGER NOT NULL,
   811	                      name TEXT NOT NULL,
   812	                      dex INTEGER NOT NULL,
   813	                      score INTEGER NOT NULL,
   814	                      PRIMARY KEY (session_id, position),
   815	                      FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES combat_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
   816	                    );
   817	                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS conditions (
   818	                      session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
   819	                      target TEXT NOT NULL,
   820	                      position INTEGER NOT NULL,
   821	                      condition_name TEXT NOT NULL,
   822	                      remaining_rounds INTEGER NOT NULL,
   823	                      PRIMARY KEY (session_id, target, position),
   824	                      FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES combat_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
   825	                    );
   826	                    INSERT OR REPLACE INTO schema_meta(key, value) VALUES
   827	                      ('driver', 'sqlite'),
   828	                      ('schema_version', '%d');
   829	                    """.formatted(SCHEMA_VERSION, SCHEMA_VERSION);
   830	        }

+        private static String hex(byte[] bytes) {
+            char[] digits = "0123456789abcdef".toCharArray();
+            char[] output = new char[bytes.length * 2];
+            for (int i = 0; i < bytes.length; i++) {
+                int value = bytes[i] & 0xff;
+                output[i * 2] = digits[value >>> 4];
+                output[i * 2 + 1] = digits[value & 0x0f];
+            }
+            return new String(output);
+        }
+    }

+    private static final class Storage {
+        static final int SCHEMA_VERSION = 1;
+        private final Path database = Path.of("game.db");
+        private boolean initialized;
+
+        synchronized void initialize() {
+            runSql(schemaSql());
+            initialized = Files.exists(database);
+        }
+
+        synchronized boolean initialized() {
+            return initialized && Files.exists(database);
+        }
+
+        synchronized void reset() {
+            try {
+                Files.deleteIfExists(database);
+            } catch (IOException e) {
+                throw new IllegalStateException(e);
+            }
+            initialized = false;
+            initialize();
+        }
+
+        synchronized void saveUser(User user) {
+            runSql("INSERT OR REPLACE INTO users(username, role, salt_hex, password_hash_hex) VALUES ("
+                    + sql(user.username()) + ", "
+                    + sql(user.role()) + ", "
+                    + sql(hex(user.passwordHash().salt())) + ", "
+                    + sql(hex(user.passwordHash().hash())) + ");");
+        }
+
+        synchronized void saveCombatSession(CombatSession session) {
+            StringBuilder sql = new StringBuilder();
+            sql.append("BEGIN;\n");
+            sql.append("INSERT OR REPLACE INTO combat_sessions(id, round, turn_index) VALUES (")
+                    .append(sql(session.id)).append(", ")
+                    .append(session.round).append(", ")
+                    .append(session.turnIndex).append(");\n");
+            sql.append("DELETE FROM combatants WHERE session_id = ").append(sql(session.id)).append(";\n");
+            for (int i = 0; i < session.order.size(); i++) {
+                Combatant combatant = session.order.get(i);
+                sql.append("INSERT INTO combatants(session_id, position, name, dex, score) VALUES (")
+                        .append(sql(session.id)).append(", ")
+                        .append(i).append(", ")
+                        .append(sql(combatant.name())).append(", ")
+                        .append(combatant.dex()).append(", ")
+                        .append(combatant.score()).append(");\n");
+            }
+            sql.append("COMMIT;");
+            runSql(sql.toString());
+        }
+
+        synchronized void saveCombatState(CombatSession session) {
+            StringBuilder sql = new StringBuilder();
+            sql.append("BEGIN;\n");
+            sql.append("UPDATE combat_sessions SET round = ")
+                    .append(session.round)
+                    .append(", turn_index = ")
+                    .append(session.turnIndex)
+                    .append(" WHERE id = ")
+                    .append(sql(session.id))
+                    .append(";\n");
+            appendConditionSave(sql, session);
+            sql.append("COMMIT;");
+            runSql(sql.toString());
+        }
+
+        synchronized void saveConditions(CombatSession session) {
+            StringBuilder sql = new StringBuilder();
+            sql.append("BEGIN;\n");
+            appendConditionSave(sql, session);
+            sql.append("COMMIT;");
+            runSql(sql.toString());
+        }
+
+        private void appendConditionSave(StringBuilder sql, CombatSession session) {
+            sql.append("DELETE FROM conditions WHERE session_id = ").append(sql(session.id)).append(";\n");
+            for (Map.Entry<String, List<Condition>> entry : session.conditions.entrySet()) {
+                List<Condition> conditions = entry.getValue();
+                for (int i = 0; i < conditions.size(); i++) {
+                    Condition condition = conditions.get(i);
+                    sql.append("INSERT INTO conditions(session_id, target, position, condition_name, remaining_rounds) VALUES (")
+                            .append(sql(session.id)).append(", ")
+                            .append(sql(entry.getKey())).append(", ")
+                            .append(i).append(", ")
+                            .append(sql(condition.name())).append(", ")
+                            .append(condition.remainingRounds()).append(");\n");
+                }
+            }
+        }
+
+        private String schemaSql() {
+            return """
+                    PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;
+                    PRAGMA user_version = %d;
+                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_meta (
+                      key TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
+                      value TEXT NOT NULL
+                    );
+                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
+                      username TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
+                      role TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      salt_hex TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      password_hash_hex TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+                    );
+                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS combat_sessions (
+                      id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
+                      round INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                      turn_index INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                      created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
+                    );
+                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS combatants (
+                      session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      position INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                      name TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      dex INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                      score INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                      PRIMARY KEY (session_id, position),
+                      FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES combat_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
+                    );
+                    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS conditions (
+                      session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      target TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      position INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                      condition_name TEXT NOT NULL,
+                      remaining_rounds INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                      PRIMARY KEY (session_id, target, position),
+                      FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES combat_sessions(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
+                    );
+                    INSERT OR REPLACE INTO schema_meta(key, value) VALUES
+                      ('driver', 'sqlite'),
+                      ('schema_version', '%d');
+                    """.formatted(SCHEMA_VERSION, SCHEMA_VERSION);
+        }
+
+        private void runSql(String sql) {
+            ProcessBuilder builder = new ProcessBuilder("sqlite3", database.toString());
+            builder.redirectErrorStream(true);
+            try {
+                Process process = builder.start();
+                try (OutputStream input = process.getOutputStream()) {
+                    input.write(sql.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
+                }
+                String output;
+                try (InputStream stream = process.getInputStream()) {
+                    output = new String(stream.readAllBytes(), StandardCharsets.UTF_8);
+                }
+                int status = process.waitFor();
+                if (status != 0) {
+                    throw new IllegalStateException(output);
+                }
+            } catch (IOException e) {
+                throw new IllegalStateException(e);
+            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
+                Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
+                throw new IllegalStateException(e);
+            }
+        }
+
+        private static String sql(String value) {
+            return "'" + value.replace("'", "''") + "'";
+        }
+
+        private static String hex(byte[] bytes) {
+            char[] digits = "0123456789abcdef".toCharArray();
+            char[] output = new char[bytes.length * 2];
+            for (int i = 0; i < bytes.length; i++) {
+                int value = bytes[i] & 0xff;
+                output[i * 2] = digits[value >>> 4];
+                output[i * 2 + 1] = digits[value & 0x0f];
+            }
+            return new String(output);
+        }
+    }
+

Implemented Stage 4 storage support in `Main.java`.

Changes:
- Initializes `game.db` on startup with SQLite schema version `1`.
- Added `GET /v1/storage/status`.
- Added `POST /v1/storage/reset`.
- Persists created users and combat state mutations into SQLite tables.
- Reset recreates storage and clears in-process benchmark state.
- Left `run.sh` intact; it still compiles and runs `java Main` in the foreground using `PORT`.

Verification:
- Ran `javac Main.java` successfully.
- Did not start the server, per the benchmark contract.
